description_long: This is a tall, slender plastic bottle filled with bright orange juice, capped with a gray screw cap that has a yellow accent. The bottle features a contoured shape for easy gripping and is wrapped with a colorful label. The label displays a splash of water, a prominent image of a ripe orange, and various product details, including branding and nutritional information. The front of the label shows the brand name and a dynamic splash graphic, while the back and sides contain text and ingredient information. The bottle is semi-transparent, allowing the vibrant orange color of the juice to be visible through the plastic. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban setting.
description: A tall, contoured plastic bottle filled with bright orange juice, featuring a gray screw cap and a colorful label with orange fruit imagery and branding.
description_view_0: The back of the bottle, showing mostly the nutritional information panel and text-heavy label details.
description_view_1: The front of the bottle, displaying the brand name and a splash graphic, with part of the orange fruit illustration visible.
description_view_2: A side view highlighting the large orange fruit illustration and splash imagery, with some branding visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the bottle, showing more of the orange fruit illustration and additional label text.
